subtitles.original: 正しさだけ纏える術があれば
subtitles.english: If only there was a way to wrap myself in righteousness...

subtitles.original: 少しは救われるだろうか
subtitles.english: ...would I be saved even just a little?

subtitles.original: その瞳へと問いかける
subtitles.english: I ask those eyes of yours.

subtitles.original: 護るべきを捨てるべきと 誰かにかどわかされても
subtitles.english: Even if someone tries to deceive me into discarding what I must protect...

subtitles.original: 心通わないなら
subtitles.english: If our hearts do not connect...

subtitles.original: それは狂気だ
subtitles.english: ...then that is madness!

subtitles.original: 何も捨てずに
subtitles.english: Without discarding anything,

subtitles.original: 抗う力なき者じゃ
subtitles.english: with no power to resist...

subtitles.original: その覚悟なき創造に 正しさなどない
subtitles.english: ...there is no righteousness in a creation without resolve.

subtitles.original: 失えば失うほどに更に気高く
subtitles.english: The more I lose, the more sublime...

subtitles.original: その意志で世界を怨め
subtitles.english: ...I hate this world with that resolve.

subtitles.original: 心が軋んで何度引き裂かれようと
subtitles.english: Even if my heart creaks and is torn apart over and over...

subtitles.original: 抗え
subtitles.english: ...resist!

subtitles.original: か弱き一人を守り抜くための",s:
subtitles.english: To protect a single fragile soul...

subtitles.original: この掌がどれだけ汚れてしまっても
subtitles.english: ...no matter how dirty these hands of mine become...

subtitles.original: 構わないさ 君が笑うなら
subtitles.english: I do not care, as long as you smile.

subtitles.original: 僕は何にでもなる
subtitles.english: I will become anything.

subtitles.original: 浅ましい擬態へつらうだけなら
subtitles.english: If we only flatter wretched imitations,

subtitles.original: 人も獣も何一つ変わらない
subtitles.english: then humans and beasts are not one bit different.

subtitles.original: 鎖に似た自由を
subtitles.english: While lamenting a freedom that resembles chains,

subtitles.original: 嘆いては歪に愛でるのでしょう
subtitles.english: we probably cherish it in a distorted way.

subtitles.original: どうか君だけは
subtitles.english: Please, at least you...

subtitles.original: 僕を覚えていて欲しい
subtitles.english: ...must remember me.

subtitles.original: 必ず君を自由へと誘う
subtitles.english: I will surely lead you to freedom.

subtitles.original: 俯けば俯くほどに更に気高く
subtitles.english: The more I look down, the more sublime...

subtitles.original: その意志で世界を揺らせ
subtitles.english: ...I shake the world with that resolve.

subtitles.original: 心が歪んで何もかもが崩れても
subtitles.english: Even if my heart is warped and everything crumbles...

subtitles.original: 抗え
subtitles.english: ...resist!

subtitles.original: か弱き一人を守り抜くための
subtitles.english: To protect a single fragile soul...

subtitles.original: この掌がどれだけ汚れてしまっても
subtitles.english: ...no matter how dirty these hands of mine become...

subtitles.original: 構わないさ 君が笑うなら
subtitles.english: I do not care, as long as you smile.

subtitles.original: 何度だって壊してみせる
subtitles.english: I will break it all as many times as it takes.

subtitles.original: 心から君が笑えた時
subtitles.english: When you can smile from the bottom of your heart...

subtitles.original: 僕は報われるのだろう
subtitles.english: ...will I finally be rewarded?

subtitles.original: 消えかけた夢に
subtitles.english: To a fading dream...

subtitles.original: ホロホロだけど
subtitles.english: ...even though it is fragile.
December 16

subtitles.original: 不安も、否定も、葛藤も。
subtitles.english: Anxiety, denial, and conflict.

subtitles.original: 私が歌で「反逆」する。
subtitles.english: I will "rebel" through my song.

subtitles.original: 1st Live 開催決定
subtitles.english: 1st Live Concert Confirmed!

subtitles.original: venue Kanadevia Hall
subtitles.english: Venue: Kanadevia Hall

subtitles.original: REBELLION Takane Lui 1st Live
subtitles.english: Takane Lui 1st Live: REBELLION

subtitles.original: ここから始まる。私だけの物語。
subtitles.english: It begins here. My own story.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで！
subtitles.english: All right! And so!

subtitles.original: 私、鷹嶺ルイの初めてのソロライブが決定しました！
subtitles.english: My very first solo concert, Takane Lui's 1st Live, has been confirmed!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！フーー！
subtitles.english: Yay! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: ということで、日程は、半年後になる...なるのですが
subtitles.english: And so, the date will be in half a year...

subtitles.original: 半年後の2026年12月16日水曜日となっております！
subtitles.english: ...specifically Wednesday, December 16, 2026!

responses.thoughts:
**Final Subtitle Generation Report**

Alright, let's get this done. The task is clear: Generate highly synchronized subtitles for this video, adhering to precise millisecond accuracy, line length constraints, and natural-sounding English translations. The input is a video with audio and lyrics in Japanese. My initial analysis involves identifying vocal start times, matching the audio, and looking for visual cues such as on-screen text.

First, I identified the vocal sections and the corresponding Japanese text by ear and by cross-referencing with the provided lyric file. The intro and outros get special treatment. I’ll make sure to note visual events like the stream’s title card, along with any other text appearing on screen. The goal is to accurately transcribe the Japanese lyrics and provide fluent and accurate English translations.

There's some meticulous syncing to do, so I checked the vocal timing. Specifically, I carefully listened to parts of the audio around certain timestamps like 00:29-00:31, and meticulously adjusted the transcriptions based on my analysis. Sometimes, there are slight deviations between the lyrics on screen and what's sung. "虚言" vs. "狂気" for example. I'm going for accuracy here.

Once the transcription is complete, I'll organize the text, keeping the line length under 50 characters. The translations will be contextually fluent and grammatically correct. There is to be absolutely no CC tags.

I have broken the subtitles into segments with matching start and end times, original Japanese text and its English translation. The visual text will be included. So that also includes the announcement about the 1st live event.

I’ve paid close attention to where the vocals begin, the visual events and the overall flow, with the goal of creating a seamless subtitle experience. Let's make sure that's all accurate and in the JSON output, including the song and event data, and everything should be ready to be returned.
